description: Orchestrate the OSMO video-data-augmentation + auto-labeling workflow: credential/control-plane preflight then submit-time guard (gate before GPU submit).
rules: destructive: deploys/repairs in-cluster NIMs, submits GPU workflows to OSMO, and writes OSMO credentials
preflight runs first; on USER_INPUT_REQUIRED stop and ask one concise unblock question
pre-submit guard must pass before any osmo workflow submit
derive storage_url from the active dataset/upload backend — never guess or default to stale s3://
never scale down or delete existing NIMs to free GPUs
all tool output (preflight + guard reports + run-ledger) lands under record_store
usage: Set WORKFLOW to one of assets/configs/osmo/{auto_labeling,augmentation_and_al,e2e,e2e_super_resolution}.yaml. Sequence: preflight_credentials -> pre_submit_guard. Optional env: NO_PROBE=1 (skip outbound probes), REFRESH=1 (force OSMO credential overwrite). Outputs: preflight.txt, pre_submit_guard.txt.
limitation: Requires OSMO CLI logged in with a DATA credential profile, an ONLINE GPU pool, HF_TOKEN (gated Cosmos/SeedVR weights), optional NGC nvapi-* key, and network egress to nvcr.io/huggingface.co. pre_submit_guard.py needs PyYAML. Not for container-internal tuning-only questions.
